violations.description: Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not stored in a clean, dry location a minimum of 6 inches above the floor. Store boxes of eggs and potatoes off floor in walk in cooler. Store box of bread and buns off floor in dry storage area.

General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --Material of nonfood contact surface was not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent and cleanable. Seal particle board divider near coffee station.
Ventilation hood systems - Design and construction. — --Ventilation hood system was not designed and/or maintained properly. Hood filters missing ribs. Need repair.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Cabinets and counters have minor build-up of food debris and need detail cleaning.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Floors have build-up and need cleaning.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Microwave & reach in freezer need cleaning.--Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Counters and shelving in kitchen need detail cleaning.--Ventilation hood system was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. Hood needs cleaning.
Storage of cleaned equipment and utensils. — --Clean equipment/utensil was not covered or inverted during storage. Invert utensils stored on lower shelf next to reach in freezer.
Plumbing system. — --Plumbing system was not designed, constructed, operated and/or maintained according to regulation. Repair drain line from walk in cooler compressor. Leaking.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Floors in kitchen has build up of debris under equipment and along matting and needs cleaning. Food spilled around stove/oven and needs cleaning. Water pooling in walk in cooler at compressor drain line.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (2 pts deducted)
